message:
feat(preview): add live-reload via SSE for instant browser refresh

Implement live-reload functionality for the preview server that
automatically refreshes connected browsers when bundle files change.

- Add LiveReloadHub with fsnotify file watching and SSE endpoint
- Inject live-reload script into HTML responses via middleware
- Add --no-live-reload flag to disable when not needed
- Debounce rapid file changes (200ms) to avoid refresh storms
- Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff on connection loss
- Enabled by default for immediate feedback during development

The SSE endpoint (/__preview__/events) sends "reload" events when
files in the bundle directory change, triggering location.reload()
in connected browsers.

Closes #81

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
